title: Inside China’s Voluntary "Fat Prisons"
channel: The Prof G Pod – Scott Galloway

transcript.text: What if the fastest way to lose weight
meant giving up your phone, your
freedom, and even the choice of when to
eat? As obesity surges across China,
thousands of adults are voluntarily
checking into so-called fat prisons,
militarystyle boot camps that promise
rapid weight loss through rigid diets,
non-stop exercise, and constant
surveillance.
>> I can see that people really want to
take drastic steps to lose weight, but
it did look sort of brutal. They're
called fat prisons in the vernacular.
The real name uh for them is weight loss
training camps. And apparently there are
uh more than a thousand of these all
over China at the moment. And although
you book yourself in voluntarily, uh
they do lock the gates. They've got
strict rules. There's constant
supervision. It seems like a very
Chinese response to an issue uh which is
to go all out and to the extreme uh and
to enforce it through this rigid
structure.
